steps.title: Use the given value of x
steps.content: The system already gives $x=10$. Because the question asks for $y$, substitute that given value into the equation that defines $y$.

steps.title: Substitute into the equation
steps.content:
Use $y=x+21$ and replace $x$ with $10$:
$$y=10+21=31$$
The solution has $y$-coordinate $31$. The answer is D.
